tagline: Learn from your sessions, evolve your skills

highlights.title: Session Analysis
highlights.description: The evolution agent scans your Claude Code conversation history — across sessions and projects — to find recurring preferences and corrections.

highlights.title: Evidence-Based Proposals
highlights.description: Every proposed change cites your actual words as evidence. Review diffs, expand quotes, and decide what fits before anything changes.

highlights.title: Apply or Rollback
highlights.description: Apply changes to your skill files with full backup. Not happy? One-click rollback restores everything. Or fork into a custom evolved mode.
